goal: The agent generates an invoice from Wency's real per-company template and saves it to OneDrive, confirm-before-finalize, with undo.
why: REQ-27, the #1 headline ask from the 2026-06-25 meeting: turn a saved credit-note/voyage PDF into a sent per-company invoice, staged for confirmation (ADR-003) and reversible.
success_criteria: Given a credit-note/voyage PDF's text, extractInvoiceFields returns the Zod-validated invoice fields (company, recipient_*, vessel, invoice_date, invoice_number, line-item amounts, currency).
generate_invoice_from_template stages a pending action showing extracted fields + matched company template and does NOT execute until confirmed (ADR-003).

On confirm, the correct per-company .docx template (Gefo vs Novo Porto, selected from invoice_templates) is filled via docxtemplater and uploaded to Verzonden Facturen/{year}; undo deletes the generated file.
E2E path holds: read PDF -> extract -> stage -> confirm -> fill -> upload, proven by seam tests.
No regression in the existing tool/confirm surface (vitest green; tsc clean).

tasks.title: Author the tagged per-company .docx templates + build script
acceptance_criteria: Both gefo.docx and novo-porto.docx exist and are valid Word documents.

Each contains the 26-047 issuer/recipient/line-item/footer structure with single-brace {tag} placeholders (recipient_name, recipient_address, recipient_vat, invoice_date, invoice_number, vessel, crewing, travel, service_fee, cash_advance, total).
A test render of each via docxtemplater 3.69.0 succeeds with no unopened/unclosed tag error.
tasks.action: npm i docxtemplater@^3.69.0 pizzip@^3.2.0. Write scripts/build-invoice-templates.ts that builds a minimal valid .docx (zip: [Content_Types].xml, _rels/.rels, word/document.xml + rels) via pizzip, embedding the 26-047 text + single-brace tags inline; produce Gefo (voyage/layover wording) and Novo Porto (plain sales) variants; run once, commit both .docx + README. After writing each, load it back with PizZip+Docxtemplater render+toBuffer to assert tags are well-formed before commit.

tasks.title: invoiceTemplate.ts (docxtemplater fill) + invoiceExtraction.ts (LLM extraction, Zod) + their seam tests
acceptance_criteria: fillInvoiceTemplate(buf, fields) returns a non-empty Buffer and throws a readable (joined) error on a malformed-tag template.

extractInvoiceFields(text) returns the Zod-validated ExtractedInvoice (company enum Gefo|Novo Porto, recipient/vessel/date strings, five amount fields, currency default EUR); throws naming invalid fields on schema failure.
Missing optional line-item amounts default to 0.00, never undefined.
invoiceTemplate.test.ts: rendering committed gefo.docx with valid fields returns Buffer byteLength>0; a bad-tag template throws a message naming the bad tag.
invoiceExtraction.test.ts: mocked complete() valid JSON -> parsed ExtractedInvoice; missing total or invalid company -> validation throw.
tasks.action: invoiceTemplate.ts: PizZip->Docxtemplater(paragraphLoop,linebreaks,nullGetter)->render->toBuffer; catch multi-error, rethrow joined; export fillInvoiceTemplate+InvoiceFields. invoiceExtraction.ts: ExtractedInvoiceSchema (z.enum companies, string+amount fields, currency default); extractInvoiceFields calls complete(), strips fences, parse, throws on ZodError; no IO. Tests: invoiceTemplate.test.ts fills gefo.docx+bad-tag throw; invoiceExtraction.test.ts vi.mock complete() pass+ZodError.

tasks.title: invoice_templates migration (RLS, seeded) + getInvoiceTemplate accessor
acceptance_criteria: 0016 creates invoice_templates with RLS enabled and NO policies, a company check (Gefo|Novo Porto), UNIQUE company, and seeds one row per company (template_ref = committed asset path, output_folder_path = alle firma's/Aquavoy Ltd/Verzonden Facturen).
getInvoiceTemplate('Gefo') and getInvoiceTemplate('Novo Porto') return the seeded rows; unknown company throws.
Migration applies cleanly via the Supabase CLI flow (no hand-edit to prod).
tasks.action: 0016_invoice_templates.sql modeled on 0015_finance_entries.sql: id uuid pk, company text check+unique (Gefo|Novo Porto), template_ref, output_folder_path, field_mapping_json jsonb, created_at; comment on table (ADR-007, service-role only); enable RLS with NO policies; seed both rows on conflict do nothing (field_mapping_json = identity token map). invoiceTemplates.ts: reuse supabaseAdmin() from pendingActions.ts; getInvoiceTemplate(company) selects one row, throws if missing.

tasks.title: generate_invoice_from_template: stage + execute + undo + REVERSIBLE_TOOLS + system prompt + confirm-path test
acceptance_criteria: Calling generate_invoice_from_template in the loop returns confirmation_required + action_id + summary and uploads nothing; fails closed without a verified principal.
On confirm: getInvoiceTemplate(company) -> read committed .docx buffer -> fillInvoiceTemplate -> uploadFile to Verzonden Facturen/{year} -> returns {itemId,name,webUrl} + undo_data{uploadedItemId}.
Undo deletes the uploaded invoice via deleteItemOnDrive; the tool is reversible in both chat and finance pending-action cards.
System prompt 5f paragraph instructs call ONCE / relay summary / do not re-call, mirroring 5e.

executeConfirmedAction.test.ts: new block mocks getInvoiceTemplate/fillInvoiceTemplate/uploadFile/readFileSync, asserts uploadFile got the year-suffixed Verzonden Facturen/{year} path and undo_data.uploadedItemId matches the uploaded id; full suite stays green.
tasks.action: onedriveTools.ts: add generate_invoice_from_template to TOOL_DEFINITIONS+DESTRUCTIVE+summarizeAction+stage branch (mirror save_email_attachment). executeConfirmedAction.ts case: getInvoiceTemplate->read buffer->fillInvoiceTemplate->uploadFile(output_folder/{year}, per-company name)->undo_data. pendingActions.ts undo: deleteItemOnDrive. Add to both REVERSIBLE_TOOLS+SYSTEM_PROMPT 5f. Extend test: vi.mock invoiceTemplates/invoiceTemplate/fs; assert uploadFile year path+undo_data. THIS tool only.
